testcase.name: test_validate_whatsapp_content_alias_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/campaigns/validate-whatsapp-content assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_campaign_ai_public_endpoints.py:41: in test_validate_whatsapp_content_alias_exists assert_not_404(response, endpoint) backend/tests/test_campaign_ai_public_endpoints.py:34: in assert_not_404 assert response.status_code != 404, f"Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: {endpoint}" E AssertionError: Endpoint missing/unrouted on public URL: /api/campaigns/validate-whatsapp-content E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
